heading: Promotion year; defined
label: 2112 Promotion year; defined
text: For the purposes of this chapter, “promotion year” means the period which commences on July 1 of each year and ends on June 30 of the following year.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 256a of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 256a of this title
